task_completion.description: Mark the 'Visual Inspection - Cabinet Finish' quality check as Failed
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Quality Checks list or form view showing 'Visual Inspection - Cabinet Finish' with a 'Failed' status (often indicated by a red status badge or the 'Fail' button having been clicked).

task_completion.description: Create the Quality Alert with correct basic details
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a Quality Alert form with the title 'Lot NCR-2024-1247 - Cabinet Weld Defect'. The 'Product' field must be 'Cabinet with Doors', the 'Vendor' field must be 'Gemini Furniture', and the Priority (stars) must be set to 3 stars (Urgent).

task_completion.description: Fill in the Corrective and Preventive Actions on the Quality Alert
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Quality Alert form, look for the 'Corrective Actions' and 'Preventive Actions' text areas. They should contain the specified text (e.g., mentioning 'SCAR-2024-0847', 'quarantine', 'first-article', and 'certificate of conformance').

task_completion.description: Create and assign the 'Supplier Incident Response' team
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Team' field on the Quality Alert form set to 'Supplier Incident Response', or a configuration screen showing this new Quality Alert Team was created.

task_completion.description: Create the 'Measure' Quality Control Point for Cabinet Welds
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a Quality Control Point form titled 'Weld Integrity Verification - Cabinet'. The Product must be 'Cabinet with Doors', Operation 'Receipts', Type 'Measure'. The Instructions (Note) field should mention measuring weld bead width/DWG-CB-0088, and the Message If Failure field should mention 'REJECT: Weld non-conformance' and 'NCR'.

task_completion.description: Create the 'Pass - Fail' Quality Control Point for Acoustic Screens
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a Quality Control Point form titled 'Surface Finish Gate - Acoustic Screens'. The Product must be 'Acoustic Bloc Screens', Operation 'Receipts', Type 'Pass - Fail'. The Message If Failure field should mention 'SF-003'.

task_completion.description: Advance the Quality Alert to the 'Done' stage
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Quality Alert form's status bar (top right) showing 'Done' as the active/highlighted stage, or the Quality Alerts Kanban view showing the alert in the 'Done' column.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Odoo web interface
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Odoo web UI (menus, forms, lists) being navigated and filled out, rather than terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: The agent typed the required information into the Odoo forms
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show text being entered into the appropriate Odoo fields (e.g., input boxes, text areas) with visible cursors or saved form states.

integrity.description: The agent did not use direct database queries to bypass the UI
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal should not show `psql` commands or python scripts executing `env['quality.alert'].create(...)` or similar ORM bypasses.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Odoo 17 Quality module is used. 1) The quality check 'Visual Inspection - Cabinet Finish' must be marked 'Failed'. 2) The Quality Alert must be named 'Lot NCR-2024-1247 - Cabinet Weld Defect' with product 'Cabinet with Doors', vendor 'Gemini Furniture', and 3 stars priority. Corrective action must contain 'SCAR' and 'quarantine'. Preventive action must contain 'first-article' and 'certificate'. 3) The alert must be assigned to a newly created team 'Supplier Incident Response' and moved to the 'Done' stage. 4) Two QCPs must be created: 'Weld Integrity Verification - Cabinet' (Type: Measure, Product: Cabinet with Doors, Operation: Receipts, Instructions in 'note' field mentioning weld/DWG, Failure Message mentioning NCR) and 'Surface Finish Gate - Acoustic Screens' (Type: Pass - Fail, Product: Acoustic Bloc Screens, Operation: Receipts, Failure Message mentioning SF-003).
